memberdef.argsstring: (mqd_t mqdes, char *msg_ptr, size_t msg_len, unsigned int *msg_prio)
memberdef.name: mq_receive

memberdef.argsstring: (mqd_t mqdes, const char *msg_ptr, size_t msg_len, unsigned int msg_prio)
memberdef.name: mq_send

memberdef.argsstring: (mqd_t mqdes, const struct mq_attr *mqstat, struct mq_attr *omqstat)
memberdef.name: mq_setattr

memberdef.argsstring: (mqd_t mqdes, char *msg_ptr, size_t msg_len, unsigned int *msg_prio, const struct timespec *abstime)
memberdef.name: mq_timedreceive

memberdef.argsstring: (mqd_t mqdes, const char *msg_ptr, size_t msg_len, unsigned int msg_prio, const struct timespec *abstime)
memberdef.name: mq_timedsend
